name: mismagent-cross-deploy
description: Cross-deploy module of mismAgent (requires the core `mismagent` plugin). When a Bounded Context boundary crosses a deploy boundary (side(consumer) != side(supplier)), the Port is projected into OpenAPI + per-side generated types + CDC publish/verify. Skills: seam-cross-deploy (loaded by the worker when boundary.projection = cross-deploy) and create-contract (reconciles the OpenAPI from the blocks, names from the ubiquitous language). Enable it on demand: a single-side project does not need it.
